user.title: Configure Three State Window
user.description: Combine a contact sensor and a tilt sensor into a single 3-state window sensor (open / tilted / closed).

data_description.contact_sensor: Binary sensor that is ON when the window is open (tilted or fully open).
data_description.tilt_sensor: Binary sensor that is OFF (closed) when the window is in the tilted position.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Three State Window
reconfigure.description: Change the contact sensor or tilt sensor for this window.

data_description.contact_sensor: Binary sensor that is ON when the window is open (tilted or fully open).
data_description.tilt_sensor: Binary sensor that is OFF (closed) when the window is in the tilted position.
